text.title: Freelancer Niche Positioning Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema for the spec this methodology produces. Validator enforces the rule-set constraints.

example.note: Violates one or more of the forbidden patterns listed below.

list.item: z is not an object with unit/direction/magnitude (rule numeric-outcome).
Any validation with passed != true while positioning_id treated as 'live' (rule search-find-test / peer-recall-test / buyer-paraphrase-test).
